name: 11p15_5_IGF2_H19_imprinted_SD
description: 11p15.5 imprinted domain harbouring IGF2, H19, INS and the two imprinting control regions ICR1 (H19/IGF2) and ICR2 (KCNQ1OT1). SDs and CTCF-binding repeat arrays at ICR1 drive UPD11/duplication events that cause Beckwith-Wiedemann and Silver-Russell syndromes.

architecture.internal_structure: ICR1 contains seven CTCF binding repeats (~450 bp each) at ~95% identity; short SD modules flank IGF2 / H19; small UPD/duplication CNVs span 0.5-3 Mb.
